ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ip_networks" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network */,
  "cidr" TEXT /* Classless Inter-Domain Routing (CIDR) notation */,
  "start_address" TEXT /* Starting IP address of the network */,
  "end_address" TEXT /* Ending IP address of the network */,
  "prefix" INTEGER /* Prefix length indicating the number of significant bits in the address */,
  "subnet_mask" TEXT /* Subnet mask for the network */,
  "network_name" TEXT /* Descriptive name for the network */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the network */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the network was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the network was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the network */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the network */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the network */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the business unit */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the business unit operates */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the business unit */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the business unit */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the business unit was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the business unit was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the business unit */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the business unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_units_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ip_allocations" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IP allocation */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network from which the IP is allocated */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business unit to which the IP is allocated */,
  "allocated_date" TEXT /* Date when the IP was allocated */,
  "allocated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who allocated the IP */,
  "deallocated_date" TEXT /* Date when the IP was deallocated */,
  "deallocated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who deallocated the IP */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the allocation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ip_allocations_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES business_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ip_allocations_deallocated_by FOREIGN KEY ("deallocated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ip_allocations_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES ip_networks ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ip_allocations_allocated_by FOREIGN KEY ("allocated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subnet_details" (
  "subnet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subnet */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network containing the subnet */,
  "subnet_name" TEXT /* Name assigned to the subnet */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose or use of the subnet */,
  "subnet_cidr" TEXT /* CIDR notation for the subnet */,
  "gateway_address" TEXT /* Gateway address for the subnet */,
  "dns_servers" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of DNS servers for the subnet */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the subnet was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the subnet was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the subnet */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the subnet */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the subnet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subnet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subnet_details_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES ip_networks ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subnet_details_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subnet_details_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ip_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IP usage record */,
  "subnet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subnet where the IP is used */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address being used */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of usage (e.g., server, router, workstation) */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the IP address was put to use */,
  "used_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who used the IP */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device using the IP */,
  "decommissioned_date" TEXT /* Date when the IP was decommissioned */,
  "decommissioned_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who decommissioned the IP */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ip_usage_decommissioned_by FOREIGN KEY ("decommissioned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ip_usage_subnet_id FOREIGN KEY ("subnet_id") REFERENCES subnet_details ("subnet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ip_usage_used_by FOREIGN KEY ("used_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., network engineer, admin) */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business unit the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the account */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES business_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, allocate) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action and its significance */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for the action */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report, including text, tables, and graphs */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file where the report is stored */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
